title: windowed aggregates
manager: Windowed aggregates — `rate/count/avg(expr, N)` — that summarize the last N values of an expression, lowering to fixed N-slot ring buffers so they stay finite and checkable. This is the common streaming-analytics need (a moving average, a recent rate) made a language primitive over a bounded window, so a machine can react to trends without the aggregate growing unbounded and blowing the finite band.
cs: `rate/count/avg(expr,N)` lower to N-slot rings (finite-eligible); windowed over the last N; builds on the stats family (W6.51).
